savedReplies.title: Order Status
savedReplies.body:
Hi {name},

Thank you for reaching out! Your order {order} is currently {status}. You can track it here: {tracking_url}

Please let us know if you have any other questions!

Best,
K.Lorayne Team

savedReplies.title: Return Instructions
savedReplies.body:
Hi {name},

We're sorry to hear that you need to make a return. Here's how to get started:

1. Email us your order number and reason for return
2. We'll send you a return shipping label
3. Package the item in its original packaging
4. Drop it off at your nearest carrier location

Returns are processed within 5-7 business days of receipt.

Best,
K.Lorayne Team

savedReplies.title: Sizing Help
savedReplies.body:
Hi {name},

Great question! Here are our sizing recommendations:

• XS: 0-2
• S: 4-6
• M: 8-10
• L: 12-14
• XL: 16-18

If you're between sizes, we recommend sizing up for a more relaxed fit. Feel free to reach out if you need more specific measurements!

Best,
K.Lorayne Team

savedReplies.title: Shipping Delay
savedReplies.body:
Hi {name},

Thank you for your patience! We apologize for the delay with your order. We're currently experiencing {reason} and your order is expected to ship within {timeframe}.

We'll send you a tracking number as soon as it ships.

Best,
K.Lorayne Team

savedReplies.title: Damage Report
savedReplies.body:
Hi {name},

We're so sorry your item arrived damaged! Could you please send us:

1. Photos of the damage
2. Your order number
3. Whether you'd prefer a replacement or refund

We'll take care of this right away.

Best,
K.Lorayne Team

savedReplies.title: VIP Thank You
savedReplies.body:
Hi {name},

We just wanted to reach out and say THANK YOU for being such an amazing customer! Your continued support means the world to us.

As a VIP, you'll always get early access to new drops and exclusive discounts. Stay tuned!

With love,
K.Lorayne Team
